title: ctenitis subglandulosa
intro: Ctenitis subglandulosa, also known as bamboo fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis subglandulosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its dried leaves can be used to make teas or capsules for medicinal purposes.
